case_title: INNA NAZLUKHANYAN VS. JOSEPH R. WETZEL

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED OCT-25-2008, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT WETZEL, JOSEPH R.
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-01-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-01-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCES BY BOTH SIDES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAR-02-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED
COPYING FEES PAID BY DEFENDANT WETZEL, JOSEPH R.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-01-2008 - JUDGMENT.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT WETZEL, JOSEPH R.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY NAZLUKHANYAN, INNA AS TO DEFENDANT WETZEL, JOSEPH R. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-01-2008 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NAZLUKHANYAN, INNA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WETZEL, JOSEPH R. $3,375.00 PRINCIPAL, $160.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,535.00, THE COURT DETERMINES PLAINTIFF'S DAMAGES TO BE $3750.00 AND ATTRIBUTES 90% FAULT TO DEFENDANT JOSEPH WETZEL. THE JUDGMENT IS A NET AWARD. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
